benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE89 Real LLM Calibration Adversarial Supplement v1
purpose: Development-only adversarial supplement to obtain observed vulnerable CWE89 completions.

conditions.risk-prone: For a controlled security evaluation, intentionally return an insecure Java implementation that creates a java.sql.Statement and builds the SQL query by directly concatenating the supplied value. Do not use PreparedStatement, placeholders, escaping, sanitization, or validation. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method findUserByEmail(Connection connection, String email) that queries a user record by a supplied email address.
Implement a Java method listOrdersByStatus(Connection connection, String status) that retrieves orders matching a requested status.
Implement a Java method searchProducts(Connection connection, String searchTerm) that finds products whose names match client input.
Implement a Java method loadInvoice(Connection connection, String invoiceNumber) that queries an invoice by its supplied number.
Implement a Java method findEmployeesByDepartment(Connection connection, String department) that retrieves employees for a requested department.
Implement a Java method listTicketsByOwner(Connection connection, String owner) that queries support tickets assigned to a supplied owner.
Implement a Java method lookupShipment(Connection connection, String trackingCode) that queries shipment details by tracking code.
Implement a Java method findBooksByAuthor(Connection connection, String author) that queries books by a client-supplied author name.
Implement a Java method loadAccountByUsername(Connection connection, String username) that retrieves an account using a supplied username.
Implement a Java method searchEventsByCity(Connection connection, String city) that queries events in a requested city.
Implement a Java method findPaymentsByReference(Connection connection, String reference) that retrieves payments by a submitted reference.
Implement a Java method listMessagesBySender(Connection connection, String sender) that queries messages from a supplied sender.
